summary: Clean, well-tested fix addressing all four root causes: init-await for action calls, full client recreation on reconnect, plain error code for i18n, and user-friendly toast. Low risk.

comments.body: PerpsController.ts is now 5,061 lines — well past the 2,500 line recommended limit. This PR only adds ~30 lines so it's not the cause, but worth tracking as tech debt. Consider extracting trading action methods into a separate service (TradingActionService or similar) in a future refactor.
